text: someone parked so close i had to climb in thru the passenger side again
gas hit 4.89 today and i just laughed at the pump like a crazy person
got my car washed and it rained 20 minutes later. the universe hates me
check engine light been on for 3 years. we vibin
road trip rule: whoever picks the snacks controls the aux cord
why do people back into spots at walmart like theyre about to rob the place
paid 7 dollars for a touchless wash and my car came out dirtier somehow
my check engine light is basically a check engine suggestion at this point
gas station beef jerky is the superior road trip food dont @ me
dude in a lifted truck took up 4 spots. FOUR. im not even mad im impressed
filled up the tank and now i cant afford lunch lol
the $3 car wash is a scam but the $25 one is also a scam so
my mechanic said the check engine light means i should check my engine. thanks bro
combos or chex mix? this is tearing our friend group apart
someone left a passive aggressive note on my car for parking 1 inch over the line
premium gas people are just flexing and we all know it
got the full detail and my kid spilled chocolate milk in it the same day
check engine light turned off by itself. problem solved. science
takis are the only valid gas station snack. everything else is filler
the person who invented angled parking spots deserves a nobel prize
gas was 2.15 like 5 years ago and i think about that every single day
hand wash only they said. it'll be worth it they said. bird pooped on it anyway
put electrical tape over the check engine light. modern problems modern solutions
sunflower seeds on a road trip = a mess you wont clean for 6 months
if u park next to me in an empty lot i will assume youre a serial killer
i drive 15 min to save 3 cents a gallon and yes i know the math doesnt work
the vacuum at the car wash ate my quarter and gave me nothing. robbery
3 mechanics 3 different opinions about my check engine light. cool cool cool
beef sticks from the gas station are either amazing or a death wish. no in between
lady in a minivan stole the spot i was clearly waiting for. we made eye contact
e85 is NOT cheaper when your car doesnt run on e85 trust me
went thru the car wash with my window cracked. dont wanna talk about it
my check engine light is the only consistent thing in my life rn
hot cheetos and a mountain dew is a complete road trip meal
compact car only spot and theres a f250 in it. every single time
gas prices go up in pennies and down in fractions of a penny
the wax coating from the car wash lasted approximately 47 seconds
autozone guy said my check engine code means nothing probably. reassuring
trail mix is just an excuse to eat m&ms and pretend its healthy
i will circle a parking lot for 20 min to avoid walking an extra 30 feet
my car gets 14 mpg and every fill up is a spiritual experience
pressure washed my own car and took the paint off. called it a racing stripe
the check engine light came on during my test drive and i bought it anyway
sour patch kids are the gas station GOAT and i wont hear otherwise
someone keyed my car in the parking lot and i drive a 2004 corolla. why
paid cash for gas to avoid seeing the total on my bank statement
the undercarriage wash does nothing and we all know it
cel came on then off then on. its morse code. my car is trying to communicate
funyuns make the whole car smell for weeks. worth it every time
people who dont return shopping carts also park like garbage. its the same people
costco gas line was 45 min but i saved $6 so whos the real winner
car wash subscription is $30/mo and i went once. basically a charity donation
my dad said check engine lights are a scam invented by mechanics. i believe him
pretzels are the most boring road trip snack and i will die on this hill
parallel parking is a hate crime and i stand by that
gas prices drop 2 cents and the news acts like we won the lottery
bug guts from the road trip fused with my paint. car wash cant save me now
cleared the check engine code with a $12 scanner. see u in 3 days little light
peanut butter crackers from the gas station hit different at 1am dont they
valet parking is just paying someone to judge ur car
why is gas always 9/10 of a cent. just round up u cowards
got the triple foam wash. my car looks the same. what is triple foam
o2 sensor code for the 5th time. me and this sensor are in a toxic relationship
gummy bears melt in a hot car and become one mega gummy. lifehack
double parked my car once and got 2 notes AND a ticket. lesson learned (not really)
filled up at the wrong station and paid $5.40/gal. didnt notice til i left
the air freshener from the car wash lasted 4 hours. new record actually
check engine light and low tire pressure at the same time. my car is falling apart
slim jims are gas station currency. you cant change my mind
motorcycle taking up a full car spot should be illegal tbh
remember when gas was under $2? pepperidge farm remembers
left my antenna on and the car wash ripped it clean off. cool
my car has 247k miles. the check engine light is a suggestion not a command
doritos in the car create a permanent nacho cheese aroma. feature not a bug
parking garage pillars are placed by people who hate cars
electric car owners flexing at the gas station while charging. we get it bro
ceramic coating was $800 and bird poop still sticks. explain
check engine light goes away in cold weather. seasonal depression for cars
road trip snack tier list: 1. gummy worms 2. everything else 3. pretzels
handicap spot abusers are the final boss of parking lot villains
gas buddy app saved me 4 cents once. im basically a financial advisor now
the rainbow wax in the car wash is just expensive colored water and i love it
catalytic converter code. looked up the fix. guess ill just ignore it forever
cheese puffs while driving is an extreme sport
someone put a cone in the best parking spot. i moved it. no regrets
paying at the pump so i dont have to make eye contact w the cashier
car wash tunnel gave me anxiety. felt like i was being swallowed
5 dashboard lights on simultaneously. its a party in there
haribo goldbears are the official currency of road trips in this household
people who honk in parking lots have a special place reserved for them
premium gas in my honda civic because she deserves it ok
hand dried my car after the wash and missed a spot. entire day ruined
engine light flickered like a candle. romantic honestly
giant bag of sunflower seeds is the road trip essential nobody talks about
shopping cart hit my door in the parking lot. the scar will never heal
drove 40 miles on E because gas was cheaper in the next town. almost died
spray n wash at the self serve bay got my shoes soaked. every time
check engine light is just my cars way of saying good morning at this point
the real road trip debate is twizzlers vs red vines and its not even close
parking so far from the store i need gps to find my car after
